message:
fix: default bd mol wisp create to root-only unless formula sets pour=true

Wisp creation was materializing child step issues for every formula,
causing ~12 orphan DB rows per patrol cycle. Wisps are vapor (ephemeral)
by definition — child steps should only be materialized when the formula
explicitly sets pour=true (e.g. release workflows needing checkpoint
recovery). Adds Pour field to Formula and TemplateSubgraph types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
